name: Western Mass Family Golf Center
about: Western Mass Family Golf Center is a multi-sport venue offering both outdoor golf activities and indoor simulation. The facility features a driving range, mini golf, batting cages, and an indoor golf simulator. PGA Professional Ed Twohig provides lessons for all skill levels, from beginners to tour professionals. The simulator is available by appointment and is operated by Golf Tournament Solutions. The center also hosts private parties and events, making it suitable for various group outings.
why_golfers_like_it: Multiple sports activities in one location

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as AboutGolf Simulator under Golf Tournament Solutions

faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, and there's no indication of BYOB policy.

faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior golf clinics and is described as a family-friendly center with activities for all ages.
